totalLending.note: Total equity release lending (lifetime mortgages and home reversion), UK. Equity Release Council.

interestRate.note: Average lifetime mortgage interest rate (fixed for life), UK. Equity Release Council market data.

plansInForce.note: Total equity release plans in force (cumulative active plans), UK.

sources.name: Which?
sources.dataset: Equity release — rates and product analysis

metadata.methodology: Total lending and plans in force from Equity Release Council member data, representing approximately 95% of the market. Average interest rate is the market-average fixed rate for new lifetime mortgage plans as published quarterly by ERC. Compound doubling time calculated as ln(2)/ln(1+rate).
knownIssues: 2022 peak coincided with house price peak and low fixed rates locked in before rate rises — market has since corrected
Plans in force figure is cumulative and includes plans with drawdown facilities not fully drawn — total outstanding debt is higher per plan
FCA Consumer Duty implementation 2023 has changed suitability assessment practices — pre/post comparison limited
